declarations.description: Form-associated text input web component with label, message, native internals validation, RTL/LTR support, slots for adornments, CSS customization, and value standardization that can show one displayValue while returning a different canonical value from .value.
declarations.name: JBInputWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial or reflected input value. Prefer the value property for controlled updates.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label text and accessible aria label.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Helper text shown below the input when no validation error is visible.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name forwarded to the inner input and used as the form field name.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Native input type forwarded to the inner input. Use specialized JB components for complex types such as date, time, mobile, payment, or number formatting.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder forwarded to the inner input and exposed through ariaPlaceholder.

attributes.name: autocomplete
attributes.description: Native autocomplete value forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: inputmode
attributes.description: Native inputmode value forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: virtualkeyboardpolicy
attributes.description: Native virtualkeyboardpolicy value forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Native readonly attribute forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the input and sets the disabled custom state.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required. A string value is used as the required validation message.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: External validation error message. When the attribute changes, the component updates its validation UI.

attributes.name: disable-auto-validation
attributes.description: Disables automatic validation on input and blur when set to empty string or true.

members.name: displayValue
members.description: Value rendered inside the native input after standardization.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper. Set validation.list or add validation list getters for custom validation.

members.name: isDirty
members.description: True when current value differs from initialValue.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs validation without showing the error message and returns whether the input is valid.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs validation, shows the first error message, and returns whether the input is valid.

methods.name: setSelectionRange
methods.description: Forwards setSelectionRange to the inner native input.

methods.name: addStandardValueCallback
methods.description: Registers a callback that can transform displayValue and submitted value.

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when the native input change event fires, usually after commit/blur.

events.name: input
events.description: Dispatched on each user input after value standardization.

events.name: beforeinput
events.description: Cancelable event dispatched before the native input changes.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Keyboard event re-dispatched from the host.

events.name: keyup
events.description: Keyboard event re-dispatched from the host.

events.name: keypress
events.description: Keyboard event re-dispatched from the host.

events.name: enter
events.description: Dispatched on keyup when Enter is pressed.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Dispatched when checkValidity or reportValidity finds an invalid value.

slots.name: start-section
slots.description: Content rendered before the native input, commonly an icon or prefix.

slots.name: end-section
slots.description: Content rendered after the native input, commonly an action, icon, or suffix.

cssParts.name: input-box
cssParts.description: The wrapper around start slot, input, and end slot.
